script:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry.json','utf8')); if (!report.ok) throw new Error('registry report failed'); const lines=['# Spike Workflow Registry Smoke', '', 'workflow_count=' + report.workflow_count, 'failed_count=' + report.failed_count, '', ...report.workflows.map((item)=>'- ' + item.workflow + '=' + item.ok)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry-smoke.md', lines.join('
') + '
'); console.log(lines.join('
'));"
command:
exec 2>&1
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry.json','utf8')); if (!report.ok) throw new Error('registry report failed'); const lines=['# Spike Workflow Registry Smoke', '', 'workflow_count=' + report.workflow_count, 'failed_count=' + report.failed_count, '', ...report.workflows.map((item)=>'- ' + item.workflow + '=' + item.ok)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry-smoke.md', lines.join('
') + '
'); console.log(lines.join('
'));"
